1.title: User CPU time
1.query:
timeseries usage = avg(github.cpu.user.usage),
  by: { dt.entity.github:instance }
| fieldsAdd github:instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.github:instance)
| sort arrayAvg(usage) desc
| limit 20

2.title: System CPU time
2.query:
timeseries usage = avg(github.cpu.system.usage),
  by: { dt.entity.github:instance }
| fieldsAdd github:instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.github:instance)
| sort arrayAvg(usage) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Idle CPU time

  by: { dt.entity.github:instance }
| fieldsAdd github:instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.github:instance)
| sort arrayAvg(usage) desc
| limit 20
